results.title: Baker Hughes Recruitment 2026: Early Career Trainee - AI Engineer | Bangalore | OffCampusJobs4u.com
highlights:
# Baker Hughes Recruitment 2026: Early Career Trainee – AI Engineer | Bangalore
[...]
## Baker Hughes Recruitment 2026 | Early Career Trainee: AI Engineer | Bangalore
[...]
Are you a recent graduate eager to learn from the best technical minds and take your career to the next level? Baker Hughes is officially inviting applications for the Early Career Trainee: AI Engineer role at its Bangalore facility. This Baker Hughes Recruitment 2026 drive is a fantastic 11-month traineeship designed to help fresh talent develop their technical knowledge, soft skills, and gain invaluable on-the-job exposure in the energy technology sector.
[...]
and the planet
[...]
means being at the
[...]
of the energy transition.
[...]
| Category | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Job Role | Early Career Trainee: AI Engineer |
| Location | Bangalore, Karnataka, India |
| Program Duration | 11 Months (Traineeship) |
| Experience Level | Freshers (Graduated within the past 12 months) |
| Qualification | Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in CS, SE, AI, or related field |
| Job Requisition ID | R164532 |
[...]
As part of the Early Career Traineeship, you will join the Cordant analytics team as a Data Science and Analytics Trainee. You will apply your strong foundation in engineering, analytics, physics-based modeling, and digital tools to practical, real-world challenges.
[...]
You will play a pivotal role in the AI lifecycle, contributing to the design, implementation, testing, and integration of AI model serving solutions and backend services. This role demands collaboration with elite cross-functional teams, including Platform & MLOps, Reliability & Support, Security, Data, and Product teams, to ensure seamless AI service delivery.
[...]
- AI Service Development: Support the development, operation, and lifecycle management of enterprise AI services.
- Model Integration: Contribute to the design, implementation, testing, and integration of AI model serving solutions and robust backend services.
- Quality Assurance: Assist in validation, troubleshooting, and performance testing to ensure high-availability solutions.
- Documentation: Prepare and maintain detailed technical documentation for AI models and system architectures.
- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with diverse teams including MLOps, Data Engineering, Security, and Product Management.
[...]
- Education: Graduate with a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, or a related technical field from an accredited university.
- Batch Eligibility: Must have graduated within the past 12 months (2025/2026 batches).
- Academic Performance: Minimum cumulative GPA of 7 (on a 10-point scale).
- Communication: Fluent in English, with strong verbal and written communication skills.
- Mindset: Demonstrates deep curiosity, an eagerness to learn, and a passion for data science and analytics.
- Work Authorization: Must be legally entitled to work within India without sponsorship or time restrictions.
[...]
Fresh graduates looking to fuel their passion and redefine the energy sector through AI can submit their applications via the official Baker Hughes Careers portal using Job ID R164532. Ensure your resume highlights your academic projects in Artificial Intelligence, backend development, or data science, along with your exact graduation date and GPA. Click the link below to apply.
[...]
1. What is the duration of the Early Career Traineeship at Baker Hughes? The traineeship is an 11-month program designed to develop your technical knowledge, soft skills, and provide practical on-the-job learning.
[...]
2. Who is eligible to apply for this AI Engineer Trainee role? Candidates who have graduated with a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in CS, SE, or AI within the past 12 months and hold a minimum GPA of 7/10 are eligible.
[...]
4. Where is the job location? This traineeship is based out of the Baker Hughes facility in Bangalore, Karnataka, India.

results.title: Digital Technology Experienced Professional – Data Science - MyPetroCareer
highlights:
Job Description – Digital Technology Experienced Professional – Data Science
[...]
Baker Hughes stands as a leading global energy-technology company, delivering innovative solutions that make energy safer, cleaner, and more efficient across the entire value chain. Operating in more than 120 countries, the company blends deep industrial expertise with advanced engineering and digital technologies to support energy production, transformation, and decarbonization. With over a century of heritage, Baker Hughes partners with customers in oil and gas, industrial sectors, and emerging energy markets to accelerate progress toward a more sustainable energy future
[...]
As an AI Engineer, you will contribute to the design, development, and deployment of production-grade AI applications, with a strong focus on Generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs). You will work closely with experienced AI engineers, data engineers, and specialist product teams to prototype, test, and scale AI-driven capabilities that deliver measurable business value.
[...]
This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, machine learning, and applied AI, and is ideal for an engineer who is excited about building reliable, responsible, and high-quality AI systems rather than standalone models.
[...]
As an AI Engineer, you will be responsible for:
[...]
Assist in developing applications using LLMs and GenAI Tools
[...]
Collaborate with our API Program to ensure quality
[...]
Create, fine tune, and adapt pre-trained models
[...]
Monitor outputs for quality, bias, security, and continued relevance
[...]
Propose and document experiments, prompts, and system designs
[...]
To be successful in this role you will:
[...]
Hold a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related discipline, or equivalent practical experience – preferably with a focus on Data and AI
[...]
Be proficient in Python and SQL, with experience working in modern data and analytics environments
[...]
Have a solid understanding of machine learning and natural language processing (NLP) concepts
[...]
Demonstrate hands-on interest or experience with Generative AI and LLM-based
[...]
Have working knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, Azure or GCP)
[...]
Be comfortable collaborating across disciplines, including engineering, product, and architecture teams
[...]
To apply for this job please visit careers.bakerhughes.com.

results.title: Lead Generative AI Specialist | Hirevector
highlights:
Lead Generative AI Specialist | Hirevector
[...]
# Lead Generative AI Specialist
[...]
Posted May 30, 2026
[...]
Are you passionate about improving capabilities, efficiency and performance? Are you interested in responsible for supporting the business owners to lean the process? Join our Digital Technology Team! Our team provides industry-leading products and services that optimize the production and processing of energy. You will contribute to our future as an AI player in the Energy Transformation industry. Partner with the best As a Generative AI Specialist, you will work in teams providing smart solution and addressing problems in a commercial technology and consultancy development environment. In this role, you will contribute to the development and deployment of modern generative AI models, techniques and operational research to leverage the power of data to solve complex problems and push the boundaries of what is possible in the ever-evolving tech landscape. As a Lead Generative AI Specialist, you will be responsible for: Designing and developing of generative AI models, including but not limited to LLMs, VLMs, GANs and Multimodal LLMs. Conducting and driving forward innovative research in the field of generative AI, leading the team in exploring new methodologies and technologies. Working closely with cross-functional teams to integrate new generative models into existing AI systems, ensuring seamless integration and optimizing performance. Developing and testing software components according to customer and technical requirements. Preparing comprehensive reports and presentations on the impact of generative AI initiatives on the business. Fuel your passion T o be successful in this role you will have: Master's degree in computer science, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field with a specialization in generative models and proven experience in the development and deployment of generative AI models. PhD is preferred Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work across different disciplines. Proven experience in software programming languages, with a focus on Python, including AI libraries eg PyTorch, TensorFlow, Transformer architecture. Demonstrated skill at function in a team setting Demonstrated awareness of critical thinking and problem solving methods Demonstrated awareness of presentation and influencing skills Ability to analyze and resolve problems through innovation and creative solutions. Natural communication skills, with an ability to engage stakeholders at all levels. Self-motivation that promotes teamwork and collaboration in a cross-functional environment. Work in a way that works for you We recognize that everyone is different and that the way in which people want to work and deliver at their best is different for everyone too. In this role, we can offer the following flexible working patterns: Working remotely from home or any other work location Working with us Our people are at the heart of what we do at Baker Hughes. We know we are better when all of our people are developed, engaged and able to bring their whole authentic selves to work. We invest in the health and well-being of our workforce, train and reward talent and develop leaders at all levels to bring out the best in each other. Working for you Our inventions have revolutionized energy for over a century. But to keep going forward tomorrow, we know we have to push the boundaries today. We prioritize rewarding those who embrace change with a package that reflects how much we value their input. Join us, and you can expect: Contemporary work-life balance policies and wellbeing activities Comprehensive private medical care options Safety net of life insurance and disability programs Tailored financial programs Additional elected or voluntary benefits The Baker Hughes internal title for this role is: Lead Engineer, Mathematics & Data Science, Research and Technology Development

results.title: Baker Hughes Hiring Entry-Level Digital Technology Professional - Software Engineer - Jobsnet.in
highlights:
Baker Hughes Hiring Entry-Level Digital Technology Professional - Software Engineer - Jobsnet.in

Baker Hughes is currently hiring for the position of Digital Technology Professional – Software Engineer. This opportunity is open to candidates with 2 to 7 years of experience and is based in Pune, Mumbai, and Navi Mumbai. Join a global leader in energy technology and take the next step in your software engineering career today.

#### About Baker Hughes Early Career Program 2026:

Job Title: Software Engineer

Experience : 2 to 7 Years handson experience

WhatsApp Channel Join Now

Telegram Channel Join Now

Salary: Best in Industry

Job Location : Pune, Mumbai , Navi Mumbai

Pay After Placement By AccioJob - Apply Now(Join Free)

Eligibility : BE/B.Tech/BSC/MCA/ME/M.Tech/MBA OR ANY STEM Graduate

#### Job Description :

As a Digital Technology Professional – Software Engineer, you will work independently and contribute to the immediate team and to other teams across business.

As a Digital Technology Professional – Software Engineer, you will also be responsible for:

- Working on back-end or front end & any language/script/technology as per the project need.
- Working on enterprise-scale/complex project that require you to connect the business needs and domain with technical knowledge.
- Learning technical framework and apply best practices for scalable and maintainable code.
- Breaking down problems and estimate time for development tasks. Understanding whole product, its modules and the interrelationship between them in the assigned component.
- Designing interfaces and information exchange between modules.

Fuel your passion!

To be successful in this role you will:

- Have been a graduate of Computer Science or in STEM Majors (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math).
- 2-7 years of hands-on full stack development in Web/Cloud application along with established leadership credentials.
- Demonstrate hands-on experience in backend development using Node.js, .net, python, frontend development using Angular, React, languages such as JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML, CSS, proficiency in MySQL, Postgres etc.
- Be proficient in building backend services like Session management, caching, algorithms & data structures, secure coding, etc.
- Be able to design and develop RESTful services & APIs using REST, XML, JSON, API gateway, implement Micro-services and docker/containerization.
- Awareness/experience in message brokers like RabbitMQ/Kafka etc., front-end frameworks/concepts like Material UI, Bootstrap, cross browser development, etc.
- Have prior experience of implementing an application on Azure/AWS using microservices.

To be successful in this role you will:

More Freshers/Entry-Level Jobs Upload Your Resume: Click Here

The intrested and eligible graduates register for the role on the following application link.

Baker Hughes Apply Link : Click Here

Join Our Whatsapp Group: Click Here

results.title: Baker Hughes Jobs UAE, Qatar, KSA, UK, Canada, Kuwait, USA, Singapore
highlights:
The company is headquartered in Houston, Texas, and has a different portfolio of products and services that feed to every stage of the oil painting and gas lifecycle. These include drilling, completions, product, and force operation results, as well as digital and artificial services.
[...]
Baker Hughes has a long history of innovation in the energy sector. It offers a broad portfolio of products and services, ranging from drilling, formation evaluation, completions, and production solutions to digital transformation, analytics, and energy transition initiatives. With its focus on technology, the company is helping to shape the future of energy by developing solutions for cleaner and more sustainable energy systems.
[...]
Digital Solutions: Providing advanced technologies for data-driven insights, predictive analytics, and performance optimization.
[...]
Baker Hughes is deeply rooted in engineering and technology, and its workforce includes thousands of engineers, scientists, and technologists. The company seeks engineers and technical experts to develop and improve products and services that drive operational efficiency and energy transformation.
[...]
Software Engineers and Data Scientists: The company’s digital arm requires talented software engineers, developers, and data scientists to work on predictive analytics, machine learning models, and artificial intelligence solutions for real-time performance monitoring, data management, and automation.
[...]
Continuous learning is a cornerstone of a career at Baker Hughes. The company offers extensive training programs for employees at all levels, from technical certifications and skills workshops to leadership development courses. Baker Hughes University is the company’s internal learning platform, offering a wide range of programs to enhance employee skills in areas such as digital technology, energy transition, and operational excellence.
[...]
Clean Energy Technologies: Engineers, scientists, and project managers are being recruited to work on clean energy solutions like hydrogen production, carbon capture technologies, and renewable energy projects. These roles represent the future of energy and are critical to Baker Hughes’ long-term strategy.
[...]
Baker Hughes Jobs UAE. Once you have found a job vacancy that suits your career plan, it’s time to apply. Make sure your CV/resume is updated, professional, positioned to sell your skills, strengths and achievements, and makes you stand out from the other candidates. Follow the steps described below the apply
[...]
- Click on the “Apply Now” link provided after each Baker Hughes job title listed above [You will be redirected to the official Baker Hughes careers portal]
- Read all the job details, education and experience, required skills, duties and responsibilities carefully
- Click on the “Apply” button
- Upload your resume/CV directly from your computer or Dropbox or Sky drive
- Fill up your personal details such as Name, Email, Mobile No., Current Employer, Current Title, Country etc.
- Click on Submit button send your Baker Hughes Job Application Online.

results.title: Senior Manager Technology Marketing - MyPetroCareer
highlights:
Job Title – Senior Manager Technology Marketing
[...]
Do you want to be part of the Commercial & Technology Marketing (CTM) Center of Experience at Baker Hughes?
[...]
Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) provides technology and solutions to industrial and energy customers worldwide. With more than a century of experience and a global footprint in more than 120 countries, we are rewriting The Energy Equation™, making energy safer, cleaner, and more efficient for people and the planet. Visit us at bakerhughes.com.
[...]
As a Senior Manager, Technology Marketing, you will play a pivotal role within the Commercial & Technology Marketing (CTM) Center of Experience. The CTM CoE is the enterprise engine for technology, commercial, and solutions marketing—responsible for how Baker Hughes brings its technologies and solutions to market through clear value articulation, customer‑centric storytelling, and disciplined go‑to‑market execution.
[...]
You will lead the technology marketing capability across Baker Hughes, ensuring products, services, and solutions are positioned, launched, and maintained effectively throughout their lifecycle. Working closely with product, technology, engineering, commercial, and regional teams, you will translate enterprise strategy into actionable frameworks, playbooks, and execution models that drive measurable customer and business impact.
[...]
As a Senior Manager, Technology Marketing, you will be responsible for:
[...]
Define, embed, and govern the Marketing & Communications playbook within the New Product Development (NPD) process, ensuring marketing is integrated early and consistently across innovation, launch, and post‑launch phases.
[...]
technology portfolio‑
[...]
‑centric value narratives.
[...]
Act as the senior marketing interface between Brand, Marketing & External Communications, product management, technology, engineering, and business segment leadership to accelerate time‑to‑market and adoption.
[...]
Market & Competitive Intelligence
[...]
Lead competitive intelligence and marketing analysis for assigned technology areas, embedding actionable insights into positioning and commercial enablement.
[...]
Guide the development of competitor benchmarking, differentiation narratives, and objection‑handling strategies.
[...]
Monitor emerging trends, customer needs, and disruptive technologies to inform marketing strategy.
[...]
technology narratives that
[...]
in priority markets.
[...]
Lead, coach, and develop a team of Technology Marketing Specialists, building depth in strategic thinking, lifecycle marketing, and value articulation.
[...]
Define and track outcome‑based KPIs aligned to CTM performance frameworks (e.g., adoption, pipeline influence, commercialization impact).
[...]
Use data and insights to optimize messaging, programs, go‑to‑market effectiveness, and resource allocation.
[...]
To be successful in this role you will:
[...]
Hold a bachelor’s degree in marketing, business, engineering, or a related field.
[...]
Bring 10+ years of experience in technology marketing, product marketing, or B2B marketing roles, with demonstrated leadership experience.
[...]
Have proven success in marketing technologies or solutions in industrial, energy, or technology‑driven environments.
[...]
Demonstrate a strategic mindset with the ability to connect technology capabilities to customer and business outcomes.
[...]
Have experience operating in global,
[...]
ed organizations.
[...]
Strong leadership in technology and product marketing.
[...]
Strategic thinking and portfolio management expertise.
[...]
Ability to develop customer‑centric value propositions.
[...]
Excellence in go‑to‑market and launch marketing.
[...]
Strong partnership with commercial and sales enablement teams.

results.title: Senior AI and ML Scientists (multiple positions) - Aker BP
highlights:
Senior AI and ML Scientists (multiple positions) - Aker BP
[...]
# Senior AI and ML Scientists (multiple positions)
[...]
Join our established AI team, bringing scientific depth and rigor to drive innovation across diverse specializations, from agentic AI to industrial vision and signal machine learning, and ensure robust, uncertainty-aware production systems.
[...]
We are seeking Senior AI and ML Scientists across several critical specialisations to bring scientific depth to our established AI organization. These roles are pivotal in raising evaluation rigor, mentoring across the team, and taking ownership of the specific modalities our industrial use cases demand.
[...]
You will apply scientific rigor across all stages of AI delivery, from initial problem framing through to evaluation design. This involves technical deep dives within your chosen specialization, contributing to our collective knowledge, and raising the bar across the team. A key aspect is mentoring data scientists and engineers, and actively moving research into production through collaboration with MLOps, architecture, and pod engineers. You will also contribute to establishing uncertainty quantification standards, understanding how prediction confidence and calibration affect safe automation thresholds, and promoting software engineering discipline in scientific work, including version-controlled experiments, peer-reviewed code, and production-ready implementations.
[...]
Track 1: Principal AI / ML Scientist
[...]
Provide scientific leadership across the full team. Set the evaluation bar, mentor across specialisations, shape research direction, and represent the AI function in architectural and strategic decisions. A high-leverage senior hire.
[...]
PhD in Machine Learning, Computer Science, Statistics, or related field — or equivalent demonstrated depth.
[...]
Track record of moving research into production, not just publishing.
[...]
Deep working knowledge of uncertainty quantification, calibration, and out-of-distribution behaviour in autonomous AI.
[...]
Track 2: Senior ML Engineer / Applied Scientist — Language and Agents
[...]
Bring deep expertise in LLM-based systems, agentic reasoning, RAG quality, evaluation frameworks for probabilistic outputs, and multi-agent coordination. Translate uncertainty in LLM outputs into concrete risk thresholds and operational guardrails.
[...]
Hands-on production experience shipping ML or LLM-based applications, ideally including agentic patterns.
[...]
Demonstrated work on evaluation methodology for probabilistic and non-deterministic outputs.
[...]
Hands-on ML and AI architecture experience including evaluation of quality performance.
[...]
Experience with calibrated uncertainty estimation in production.
[...]
Track 3: Senior Signal Processing / Acoustic ML Engineer
[...]
Specialist depth in acoustic signal processing and related machine-learning approaches. Relevant across subsurface, operations, and equipment monitoring use cases.
[...]
Track 4: Senior Computer Vision Engineer / Scientist
[...]
Machine Learning, or related
[...]
Our ambition is clear: to become the world’s first AI‑native exploration and production company.
[...]
We're hiring to accelerate our journey towards becoming the first AI-native E&P company.
[...]
We didn't discover AI last year. For a decade, we've been building the data foundation and interoperable ecosystem that now lets us scale AI across some of the most complex operations in our industry.
[...]
Our ambition is simple to state and hard to deliver: a 3x productivity improvement. Getting there demands more than incremental gains, it requires a fundamental redesign of how work gets done. You get there by redesigning how decisions are made, how work is planned, and how assets are run, with AI agents as native participants in the operating model. And that's why we're looking for ambitious, driven AI professionals who want to help rewrite how a large industrial company operates.

results.title: AI Solutions Engineer - Aker BP
highlights:
AI Solutions Engineer - Aker BP
[...]
# AI Solutions Engineer
[...]
Are you an AI Solutions Engineer who thrives on translating complex business problems into tangible, production-ready AI solutions within a dynamic, cross-functional environment? Join us and anchor one of our AI delivery pods, making a real impact on our journey to become the first AI-native E&P company.
[...]
Strong technical hands-on background in AI/ML engineering, data engineering, or AI solutions delivery.
[...]
Proven ability to lead and deliver production-ready AI systems, with a strong track record of shipping LLM-based or agentic solutions.
[...]
Deep understanding of probabilistic AI outputs, operational risk, and designing safeguards for agentic workflows.
[...]
About the role
[...]
Drive AI Innovation in the Energy Sector.
[...]
We are building seven cross-functional AI delivery pods aligned to business domains. Each pod needs a technical anchor – someone who can lead end-to-end AI use-case delivery while partnering closely with business domain experts, data engineering, and central AI functions.
[...]
As an AI Solution Engineer, you are the cross-functional glue. You translate business problems into AI solutions, shape technical approach, coordinate with architecture and platform teams, develop and test AI solutions, and make sure what ships actually works in production and adds measurable value.
[...]
Aker BP is building the foundation for agentic AI at scale. We are doing this as one operating model; strategy, architecture, science, data, safety, and delivery designed to work together, not as separate teams. This role is part of that build.
[...]
We are moving AI into the core of industrial operations, work that spans physical assets, regulated environments, and decisions that affect production, safety, and the broader energy system. We work cross-disciplinarily, with a focus on shipping into production rather than running experiments indefinitely.
[...]
Key responsibilities
[...]
AI solution designCollaborate closely with domain specialists to translate business needs into implementable AI solutions.
[...]
Impact-driven prioritisationDrive use-case prioritisation based on data readiness, technical feasibility, and business impact.
[...]
AI delivery and developmentLead the end-to-end technical delivery of AI and agentic AI use cases within your assigned pod.
[...]
Cross-functional coordinationCoordinate with central architecture, MLOps, security, and data governance teams to ensure compliance with enterprise standards.
[...]
Own quality and productionOwn evaluation setup, quality bars, and production readiness, including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and code-review standards.
[...]
Uncertainty handlingDesign solutions with explicit handling of model uncertainty, defining confidence thresholds, fallback behaviours, and human-in-the-loop checkpoints.
[...]
AI-first mindsetWe are an AI-first company, committed to leading our industry in AI adoption and unlocking its transformative power.
[...]
### About Aker BP
[...]
Our ambition is clear: to become the world’s first AI‑native exploration and production company.
[...]
We're hiring to accelerate our journey towards becoming the first AI-native E&P company.
[...]
We didn't discover AI last year. For a decade, we've been building the data foundation and interoperable ecosystem that now lets us scale AI across some of the most complex operations in our industry.
[...]
Our ambition is simple to state and hard to deliver: a 3x productivity improvement. Getting there demands more than incremental gains, it requires a fundamental redesign of how work gets done. You get there by redesigning how decisions are made, how work is planned, and how assets are run, with AI agents as native participants in the operating model.
[...]
And that's why we're looking for ambitious, driven AI professionals who want to help rewrite how a large industrial company operates.

that provides solutions to energy and industrial customers

results.title: GE Aviation Recruitment 2026: Data Science Specialist | Bengaluru | OffCampusJobs4u.com
highlights:
Are you a highly curious and creative graduate ready to advance aerospace for future generations? GE Aviation (GE Aerospace) is officially inviting applications for the Data Science Specialist position at its multidisciplinary research and engineering hub in Bengaluru. This GE Aviation Recruitment 2026 drive is an incredible opportunity for freshers to deploy modern machine learning, operational research, and semantic analysis methods on large data sets within a commercial technology environment.
[...]
| Category | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Job Role | Data Science Specialist |
| Company | GE Aviation (GE Aerospace) |
| Location | Bengaluru, Karnataka, India |
| Experience Level | Fresher |
| Employment Type | Permanent Job / Full Time |
| Core Tool Stack | Python, GenAI, AWS/Azure/Databricks, ML |
[...]
As a Data Science Specialist, you will be part of a cross-disciplinary team working on commercially-facing development projects involving massive, complex data sets. These teams include statisticians, computer scientists, software developers, engineers, and product managers working in concert with partners in GE business units. Potential application areas include remote monitoring and diagnostics across industrial sectors, operations optimization, and financial portfolio risk assessment.
[...]
You will play a critical role in addressing customer needs by developing applied, predictive, and prescriptive analytics. Working closely with data engineers and software developers, you will perform data quality assessments, translate algorithms into commercially viable services, and generate annotated code and project artifacts to document your outcomes.
[...]
- Algorithm Development: Develop applied analytics, predictive analytics, and prescriptive analytics within well-defined projects to address customer opportunities.
[...]
- Commercial Translation: Work alongside software developers and engineers to translate complex algorithms into viable, commercial products and services.
[...]
- Data Analysis: Perform targeted and exploratory data analyses using descriptive statistics and advanced ML methods.
[...]
- Data Quality: Collaborate with data engineers on rigorous data quality assessments, data cleansing, and pre-processing.
[...]
- Reporting: Generate
[...]
- Education: B.Tech / B.E. or an equivalent Bachelor’s degree in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Applied Statistics, or a related technical field.
- Programming Proficiency: Absolute proficiency in Python is mandatory.
- Generative AI: Demonstrated skill and hands-on experience in implementing GenAI solutions (including fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and leveraging pre-trained models).
[...]
- Cloud & ML Platforms: Familiarity with major cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure) and unified analytics platforms like Databricks, along with their native AI/ML services.
[...]
- Data Handling: Demonstrated skill in data quality assessment, robust cleaning, pre-processing, and leveraging AI/ML methods for solving real-world business problems.
[...]
Freshers ready to mobilize a new era of growth in aerospace and defense can submit their applications through the official GE Aerospace Careers portal. Ensure your resume prominently features your Python programming expertise, your hands-on GenAI academic or personal projects, and any exposure to AWS or Azure environments. Click the link below to apply directly.
[...]
1. Are freshers eligible to apply for this Data Science Specialist role? Yes, this is an entry-level/fresher opportunity for candidates holding a B.Tech/B.E. in AI, ML, Computer Science, or Applied Statistics.
[...]
2. What is the mandatory programming language for this role? Proficiency in Python is strictly mandatory for this position.
[...]
3. Will I be working with Generative AI technologies? Yes, the ideal candidate must have demonstrated skill in implementing GenAI solutions, which includes prompt engineering and fine-tuning pre-trained models.
